meta.description: Hello, my name is Yannic Inselmann. I'm a software developer from germany with focus on webdevelopment. Learn more about me and my work...

hero.name: Yannic Inselmann
hero.what: I am a senior software developer at kolum, Freelancer and always curious for challenging sideprojects.

projects.label: Selected Works
